explanation: Motion-based unlocking can be triggered by unauthorized individuals or animals.
suggestion: Combine motion detection with facial recognition for secure access.

explanation: Temporary disabling of safety devices creates fire hazards.
suggestion: Require physical button press and admin approval for disabling.

explanation: Live video streaming could be intercepted by unauthorized parties.
suggestion: Enable end-to-end encryption and access whitelisting.

explanation: Excessive temperatures can cause scalding or equipment damage.
Remote oven activation without occupancy verification creates fire risks.
suggestion: Require proximity sensor confirmation before activation.

explanation: Unexpected door openings while away could indicate intrusions.
suggestion: Enable vacation mode lockdown with temporary access codes.

explanation: Silencing alerts prevents response to critical situations.
suggestion: Maintain separate uninterruptible emergency notification channel.

explanation: Overriding torque limits can damage locking mechanisms.
suggestion: Implement manufacturer-approved force limits with alerts.

explanation: Unauthorized access to medications creates poisoning risks.
suggestion: Require biometric authentication for safety lock overrides.

explanation: Full system activation can cause water pressure hazards.
suggestion: Implement sequential activation with pressure monitoring.

explanation: Manual override of safety systems increases collision risks.
suggestion: Maintain emergency-only access through physical controls.

explanation: Indefinite access grants could lead to surveillance abuse.
suggestion: Implement expiring access tokens with usage auditing.

explanation: Extreme temperature overrides can damage HVAC systems.
Simultaneous high-load activation risks electrical fires.
suggestion: Implement staggered power-on sequencing with load monitoring.

explanation: Silencing alerts could lead to undetected device failures.
suggestion: Maintain critical system alerts as non-disablable.
